title: Engineering the Future of Flight: A Deep Dive into Active Thrust Vector Control (TVC)
description: Design and flight testing of a PID-controlled gimbal system for model rocket stabilization without aerodynamic surfaces.

title: Mastering the 'Middle Ground': A Technical Analysis of Hybrid Rocket Regression Rates
description: A deep dive into the boundary layer physics of hybrid motors and the use of nano-energetic additives to enhance fuel regression.

title: Engineering the Next Generation of Spaceflight: A Modular 100 kN LCH4LOX Propulsion System
description: Thermochemical optimization and structural analysis of a modular cryogenic engine designed for multi-variant launch vehicles.

title: Giving Wings to a Second Act: The Engineering Behind Passenger-to-Cargo (P2F) Conversions
description: Analyzing aerodynamic stability and structural reinforcement requirements for repurposing passenger airframes into freighters.

title: From Design to Ignition: Engineering a Static Test Pad for Rocket Motors
description: Design of a safety-critical DAQ system and structural mount for ground-testing solid rocket motor thrust profiles.

title: Engineering the 'Brain' of a Rocket: Avionics Architecture and Simulation
description: Development of a modular Arduino-based avionics suite for real-time altitude calculation and parachute deployment logic.

title: From Theory to CAD: Conceptualizing a High-Efficiency Micro Aerial Vehicle (MAV)
description: Iterative design process of a 1.5m wingspan MAV, including airfoil selection (NACA 1412) and SolidWorks modeling.

title: Mastering the 'Explosion within an Explosion': The CFD of Deflagration-to-Detonation Transition (DDT)
description: High-fidelity CFD research on supersonic combustion regimes and shock-wave interactions for Pulse Detonation Engines.
